name: Baker Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen strawberries in juice, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in 1 cup boiling water.
2. Add all fruit (undrained) to the dissolved gelatin and mix well.
3. Pour half of the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
4. Leave the remaining gelatin at room temperature.
5. Chill the gelatin until set, about 1 hour or until firm.
6. Spread sour cream over the chilled mixture.
7. Pour the remaining gelatin over top and chill until completely set.
Breakstone's is the best nonfat yogurt for this recipe.
